title: Glimmering Gardens
description: adds some small environmental features and improvements
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e801330d4cbacd01f0128243579edf0e722c34fe_0.webp)


---

_**Glimmering Gardens is a small mod that tries to bring a little bit more life to specific biomes.**_

---

currently it only adds Fireflies and features related to them, but there are more features planned

 **_Fireflies:_** These two-pixel mobs will light up the overworld nights, they can be found in Birch Forests, Swamps, Mangrove Swamps, Sunflower Plains and Meadow biomes. You can also catch up to 8 fireflies in a bottle, a full Firefly Bottle can be used to craft a Firefly Lantern. Fireflies tend to move towards nearby light sources and other fireflies.

---

_this mod is made with mcreator_

---

**_Links:_** [CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glimmering-gardens)
